titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 92 – The Imamasws is such that none can wash himasws (funeral wash) except an Imamasws from the Imamsasws

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 92 – The Imamasws is such that none can wash himasws (funeral wash) except an Imamasws from the Imamsasws

segments: قُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّهُمْ يُحَاجُّونَّا يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا الْإِمَامُ قَالَ فَقَالَ مَا يُدْرِيهِمْ مَنْ غَسَلَهُ فَمَا قُلْتَ لَهُمْ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قُلْتُ لَهُمْ إِنْ قَالَ مَوْلَايَ إِنَّهُ غَسَلَهُ تَحْتَ عَرْشِ رَبِّي فَقَدْ صَدَقَ وَ إِنْ قَالَ غَسَلَهُ فِي تُخُومِ الْأَرْضِ فَقَدْ صَدَقَ
قَالَ لَا هَكَذَا قَالَ فَقُلْتُ فَمَا أَقُولُ لَهُمْ قَالَ قُلْ لَهُمْ إِنِّي غَسَلْتُهُ فَقُلْتُ أَقُولُ لَهُمْ إِنَّكَ غَسَلْتَهُ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ .
arabic.text:
قُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّهُمْ يُحَاجُّونَّا يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا الْإِمَامُ قَالَ فَقَالَ مَا يُدْرِيهِمْ مَنْ غَسَلَهُ فَمَا قُلْتَ لَهُمْ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قُلْتُ لَهُمْ إِنْ قَالَ مَوْلَايَ إِنَّهُ غَسَلَهُ تَحْتَ عَرْشِ رَبِّي فَقَدْ صَدَقَ وَ إِنْ قَالَ غَسَلَهُ فِي تُخُومِ الْأَرْضِ فَقَدْ صَدَقَ

قَالَ لَا هَكَذَا قَالَ فَقُلْتُ فَمَا أَقُولُ لَهُمْ قَالَ قُلْ لَهُمْ إِنِّي غَسَلْتُهُ فَقُلْتُ أَقُولُ لَهُمْ إِنَّكَ غَسَلْتَهُ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washha, from Ahmad Bin Umar Al Hallal, or someone else,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘They are arguing against us saying that the Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (for funeral) except for (another) Imam<sup>asws</sup>. What would make them know who washed him<sup>asws</sup>? So what did you say to them?’ So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! I said to them, ‘If my Master<sup>asws</sup> says that he<sup>asws</sup> washed him (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) beneath the Throne of my Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> has spoken the truth, and if he<sup>asws</sup> says that he<sup>asws</sup> washed him<sup>asws</sup> in the surrounding of the earth, so he<sup>asws</sup> has spoken the truth’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Not like this’. So I said, ‘So what should I be saying to them?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Say to them that I<sup>asws</sup> washed him (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)’. So I said, ‘Shall I say to them that you<sup>asws</sup> washed him<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. (Note – the 7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> passed away at Baghdad while 8<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> was in Madina - hence the questioning).
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washha, from Ahmad Bin Umar Al Hallal, or someone else,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘They are arguing against us saying that the Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (for funeral) except for (another) Imam<sup>asws</sup>. What would make them know who washed him<sup>asws</sup>? So what did you say to them?’ So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! I said to them, ‘If my Master<sup>asws</sup> says that he<sup>asws</sup> washed him (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) beneath the Throne of my Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> has spoken the truth, and if he<sup>asws</sup> says that he<sup>asws</sup> washed him<sup>asws</sup> in the surrounding of the earth, so he<sup>asws</sup> has spoken the truth’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Not like this’. So I said, ‘So what should I be saying to them?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Say to them that I<sup>asws</sup> washed him (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)’. So I said, ‘Shall I say to them that you<sup>asws</sup> washed him<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. (Note – the 7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> passed away at Baghdad while 8<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> was in Madina - hence the questioning).

segments: 1. al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘Umar al-Hallal or someone other than him who has said the following. “I said to al-Rida (a.s.), ‘They argue with us that no one has the authority towash the body of an Imam for burial except.” The narrator has said that the Imam (a.s.) then said, “How they would know who has washed him for burial? What did you say to them?” The narrator has said that I then said, May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, I told them that if my Imam would say that he has washed his body under the throne of the Lord he has told the truth. If he would saay that he has washed it at the center of the earth he has told the truth.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “It is not that way.” I then asked him, “What then should I say to them (al-waqifiyya sect)?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Tell them that I (al-Rida ) washed his body for burial.” I then asked, “must I tell them that you have washed his body?” He said, “Yes, I have done so.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘Umar al-Hallal or someone other than him who has said the following. “I said to al-Rida (a.s.), ‘They argue with us that no one has the authority towash the body of an Imam for burial except.” The narrator has said that the Imam (a.s.) then said, “How they would know who has washed him for burial? What did you say to them?” The narrator has said that I then said, May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, I told them that if my Imam would say that he has washed his body under the throne of the Lord he has told the truth. If he would saay that he has washed it at the center of the earth he has told the truth.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “It is not that way.” I then asked him, “What then should I say to them (al-waqifiyya sect)?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Tell them that I (al-Rida ) washed his body for burial.” I then asked, “must I tell them that you have washed his body?” He said, “Yes, I have done so.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (256/ 4)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (256/ 4)

gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْوَشَّاءِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عُمَرَ الْحَلَّالِ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ عَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عُمَرَ الْحَلَّالِ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 92 – The Imamasws is such that none can wash himasws (funeral wash) except an Imamasws from the Imamsasws

segments: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْإِمَامِ يَغْسِلُهُ الْإِمَامُ قَالَ سُنَّةُ مُوسَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ ( عليه السلام ) .
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْإِمَامِ يَغْسِلُهُ الْإِمَامُ قَالَ سُنَّةُ مُوسَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ ( عليه السلام ) .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Hamhour who said, ‘Abu Ma’mar narrated to us saying,
‘I asked Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the Imam<sup>asws</sup> washing the Imam<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sunnah of Musa<sup>as</sup> Bin Imran<sup>as</sup>’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Hamhour who said, ‘Abu Ma’mar narrated to us saying,

‘I asked Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the Imam<sup>asws</sup> washing the Imam<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sunnah of Musa<sup>as</sup> Bin Imran<sup>as</sup>’.

segments: 2. It is narrated from him from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Jumhur from Yunus from Talha who has said the following. “Once I said to al-Rida (a.s.), ‘Is it true that only an Imam has the authority to wash the body of an Imam for burial?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Do you know who comes to wash his body for burial? One who is better than the one who is absence from his presence comes to wash. Those who came to Joseph in the well to help when his parents and family were absent from him.”
en.sarwar.text: 2. It is narrated from him from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Jumhur from Yunus from Talha who has said the following. “Once I said to al-Rida (a.s.), ‘Is it true that only an Imam has the authority to wash the body of an Imam for burial?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Do you know who comes to wash his body for burial? One who is better than the one who is absence from his presence comes to wash. Those who came to Joseph in the well to help when his parents and family were absent from him.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (257/ 4)
gradings.label: ضعيف

gradings.text: Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُمْهُورٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
titles.en: Chapter 92 – The Imamasws is such that none can wash himasws (funeral wash) except an Imamasws from the Imamsasws

segments: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا الْإِمَامُ فَقَالَ أَ مَا تَدْرُونَ مَنْ حَضَرَ لِغُسْلِهِ قَدْ حَضَرَهُ خَيْرٌ مِمَّنْ غَابَ عَنْهُ الَّذِينَ حَضَرُوا يُوسُفَ فِي الْجُبِّ حِينَ غَابَ عَنْهُ أَبَوَاهُ وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا الْإِمَامُ فَقَالَ أَ مَا تَدْرُونَ مَنْ حَضَرَ لِغُسْلِهِ قَدْ حَضَرَهُ خَيْرٌ مِمَّنْ غَابَ عَنْهُ الَّذِينَ حَضَرُوا يُوسُفَ فِي الْجُبِّ حِينَ غَابَ عَنْهُ أَبَوَاهُ وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ .

segments: And from him, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Yunus, from Talha who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (for funeral) except (another) Imam<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What would make you know who was present for his<sup>asws</sup> washing? (The ones who) had attended it were better than those who were absent from it. Those who attended Yusuf<sup>as</sup> in the well when his<sup>as</sup> parents and his<sup>as</sup> family were absent from him<sup>as</sup>’.
en.hubeali.text:
And from him, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Yunus, from Talha who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (for funeral) except (another) Imam<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What would make you know who was present for his<sup>asws</sup> washing? (The ones who) had attended it were better than those who were absent from it. Those who attended Yusuf<sup>as</sup> in the well when his<sup>as</sup> parents and his<sup>as</sup> family were absent from him<sup>as</sup>’.

narratorChain.raw: وَعَنْهُ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُمْهُورٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ طَلْحَةَ قَالَ
